features.title: Enterprise Integrations
features.description: Connect your existing CRM, ERP, data warehouse, or communication platforms to the Heady™ ecosystem. Pre-built connectors for Salesforce, HubSpot, SAP, Slack, and more — with custom integration support for bespoke systems.

features.title: White-Label Options
features.description: Deploy Heady™ AI capabilities under your own brand. HeadyBuddy, HeadyBot, and core API services can be fully white-labeled with your logo, colors, and domain — giving your clients a seamless branded AI experience.

features.title: Dedicated Support
features.description: Every enterprise partner gets a named customer success manager, priority response SLAs, and access to a dedicated Slack channel with the Heady engineering team. We don't leave partners to figure it out alone.

features.title: SLA Guarantees
features.description: Enterprise agreements include legally binding SLAs covering uptime, response times, and incident resolution. Our infrastructure is backed by Google Cloud's global network and Cloudflare's edge — so your commitments to clients are always met.

features.title: Custom Workflows
features.description: Work with the HeadyConnection team to design custom AI workflows tailored to your specific business processes. From document intelligence pipelines to automated client onboarding — we build solutions that fit your operations.

features.title: Partner Portal
features.description: Access deal registration, co-marketing materials, technical documentation, sandbox environments, and revenue sharing dashboards — all through the HeadyConnection partner portal. Built for agencies, VARs, and technology partners.
